pattern_explanations.requests_money_transfer: Asks victim to send money via M-Pesa, bank transfer, or agent
pattern_explanations.uses_emotional_pressure: Uses fear, panic, guilt, or excitement to cloud judgment

pattern_explanations.impersonates_authority: Caller claims to be from a government body, bank, or known institution
pattern_explanations.impersonates_bank: Pretends to be a bank employee or fraud department
pattern_explanations.requests_PIN_or_password: Asks for M-Pesa PIN, ATM PIN, internet banking password, or account password
pattern_explanations.requests_OTP: Asks for the one-time password or verification code sent to the victim's phone
pattern_explanations.creates_false_urgency: Invents a deadline (minutes, hours) to prevent the victim from thinking or consulting others
pattern_explanations.uses_emotional_pressure: Uses fear, panic, guilt, or excitement to cloud judgment
pattern_explanations.credential_phishing: Collects login credentials, passwords, or security codes
